# Neliohinnat.fi — Finnish Housing Price Map

> Interactive map application showing estimated price per square meter for every residential building in Finland. Free, open data, no login required.

## What This Service Does

Neliohinnat.fi (brand name: Neliöt) estimates the €/m² price of approximately 270,000 residential buildings across Helsinki, Tampere, and Turku metropolitan areas. Users can zoom into any neighborhood, click any building, and see a detailed price estimate with factor breakdown.

## How Prices Are Calculated

The algorithm combines 6 factors applied to a base price from Statistics Finland (Tilastokeskus) transaction data:

1. **Base price**: Real €/m² from StatFin by postal code, year, and property type
2. **Building age**: U-curve factor — new builds command 50%+ premium, 1960s-70s panel houses are cheapest, pre-war buildings recover value
3. **Water proximity**: Up to 35% premium for waterfront properties (lakes >1ha and sea only)
4. **Floor count**: Slight premiums for single-story row houses and tall apartment buildings
5. **Building size**: Smaller buildings command higher €/m² (exclusivity premium)
6. **Neighborhood correction**: Market-calibrated factor from 1,100+ real Etuovi.fi listing prices

## Data Sources (all open, CC BY 4.0 or ODbL)

- Statistics Finland (Tilastokeskus) — transaction prices, demographics, socioeconomics
- National Land Survey of Finland (MML) — building geometries, addresses, land transaction statistics
- SYKE Ryhti building registry — construction year, floor count, building purpose, apartment count
- OpenStreetMap — supplementary building data

## Key Pages

- Homepage (map): https://www.neliohinnat.fi
- City overview: https://www.neliohinnat.fi/kaupunki/helsinki
- City overview: https://www.neliohinnat.fi/kaupunki/tampere
- City overview: https://www.neliohinnat.fi/kaupunki/turku
- Area directory: https://www.neliohinnat.fi/alue
- FAQ / methodology: https://www.neliohinnat.fi/faq
- Individual area example: https://www.neliohinnat.fi/alue/00100 (Helsinki center)

## Current Accuracy

Mean absolute error ~18% vs Etuovi.fi asking prices (validated March 2026, 87 listings). Areas with neighborhood correction factors have ~12% accuracy. Estimates are indicative — not official appraisals.

## Coverage

- Helsinki metropolitan area (Helsinki, Espoo, Vantaa, Kauniainen)
- Tampere region (incl. Nokia)
- Turku region
- ~270,000 priced residential buildings out of ~700,000 total
- 406 postal code areas, 107 municipalities with price data

## Property Types

- Kerrostalo (apartment building)
- Rivitalo (row house / townhouse)
- Omakotitalo (detached house)

## Language

The service UI is in Finnish. Data covers Finland only.
